events.description: Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting on Sunday, March 15, 2026 from 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM EST. Location: ACME Corp Headquarters Executive Boardroom (200 Park Avenue, New York). Virtual option available via Zoom (Meeting ID: 987 654 3210, Passcode: Board2026). Tentative agenda includes: Call to Order (10:00 AM), CEO Report (10:15 AM), CFO Financial Review (11:00 AM), Working Lunch (12:00 PM), Strategic Initiatives (1:00 PM), Committee Reports (2:30 PM), New Business (3:30 PM), Adjournment (4:00 PM). Board materials distributed one week prior. Attendance confirmation required by March 1st.
